source: Derived: Census 2016 profile (tenure, income, dwelling type, one-person households, seniors 65+, young adults 20-29) + OSM building density + Business Improvement Areas (commercial density).
method: REAL drivers (tenure/income/dwelling/age/BIA/density) → MODELED archetype mapping: tenure splits owner/renter; dwelling type splits owner-detached vs condo-owner; income splits renter-low vs renter-mid; senior65+ and young-adult shares carve out senior/student; small-business from BIA overlap + density. Proportions sum to 1.
